meaning: adv.同样地,照样地,又,也n.同样地
examples: Her second marriage was likewise unhappy.
What is fair for homeowners likewise should be fair to businesses.
He voted for the change and he expected his colleagues to do likewise.
Likewise, Credit Suisse First Boston has talked about an exit from its merchant bank.
Likewise, developer Rare, after being acquired by Microsoft, has fired only blanks for the Xbox.
